word: G5250 - ὑπερπλεονάζω - hyperpleonázō - hoop-er-pleh-on-ad'-zo - Be exceeding abundant

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑπερπλεονάζω

- Transliteration: Huperpleonazo

- Phonetic: hoop-er-pleh-on-ad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to be exceedingly abundant

2. to overflow

3. to possess in excess

- Origin: from G5228 and G4121

- TDNT entry: 10:23,9

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5228 and G4121; to super abound: - be exceeding abundant.
